subject: [PATCH v3 28/28] nfsd: add support to CB_NOTIFY for dir attribute changes

2026-04-28.patch_summary: This patch adds support to CB_NOTIFY in the NFS server (nfsd) to send notifications about changes to directory attributes when requested by the client. The change is made to the nfs4state.c and nfs4xdr.c files, where a new condition is added to check if the client has requested dir attribute change notifications. If so, an additional event is sent alongside other events like add/remove/rename operations. This ensures that clients receive timely updates about directory attribute changes.
